examples: Scott of the Antarctic was a national hero of mythic proportions.
Yeats takes on self-consciously staged identities, requiring costumes, and he sees other people in similarly theatrical and mythic terms.
The name Bora Bora evokes images of a mythic paradise.
Clemons gave Springsteen a mythic companion who embodied the fraternal spirit of the band.
Galen Rowell, a near mythic figure in mountaineering and wildlife photography, was recruited for the journey.
